---
title: "Building the Universities of the Future through Social Innovation Education (BUFSIE)"
sort_year: 2023
year: "2020 – 2023"
status: "Past"
funder: "Erasmus+"
categories: [Public Opinion & Argument Mining, Past]
---

**Year:** 2020 – 2023
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** Erasmus+
**Research Cluster:** Public Opinion & Argument Mining
